name: Light Apple Cake (c) (Ovo)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spray a ring mold or fluted tube pan with nonstick vegetable coating.
2. Place sliced apples in a large bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, combine 1 tablespoon sugar, 1 tablespoon apple juice concentrate, and cinnamon. Pour over the sliced apples and stir until evenly covered. Set aside.
4. In another bowl, mix together the flours, 3/4 cup sugar, baking powder, and salt. Stir in the oil, 1 cup apple juice concentrate, vanilla, egg, egg whites, and orange juice.
5. Pour half of the batter into the prepared mold.
6. Layer half of the apple mixture over the batter.
7. Repeat with the remaining batter and apples.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F for 1 1/2 hours. Turn off the heat and remove from the oven.
9. Allow to cool before removing from the pan.
